task_completion.description: Create two visible chart windows for AAPL and MSFT
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two separate chart windows or tabs within the NinjaTrader 8 interface. One must be clearly labeled 'AAPL' and the other 'MSFT' in the window title bar or tab header.

task_completion.description: Configure AAPL chart with 50-period and 200-period SMAs
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the AAPL chart's main price panel, look for two moving average lines. The indicator legend (typically in the top-left corner of the chart) must explicitly list 'SMA (50)' and 'SMA (200)' or similar notation.

task_completion.description: Configure AAPL chart with a Volume sub-panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Below the main AAPL price chart, look for a separate sub-panel displaying vertical histogram bars representing trading volume. It should be labeled 'Vol' or 'Volume'.

task_completion.description: Configure MSFT chart with 20-period EMA and Bollinger Bands (20, 2)
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the MSFT chart's main price panel, look for a single moving average line (EMA) and an envelope of three lines (Bollinger Bands). The indicator legend must explicitly list 'EMA (20)' and 'Bollinger (20, 2)' or similar notation.

task_completion.description: Configure MSFT chart with a MACD (12, 26, 9) sub-panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: Below the main MSFT price chart, look for a separate sub-panel displaying the MACD indicator (typically two lines and a histogram). The sub-panel legend must list 'MACD (12, 26, 9)'.

Look at the NinjaTrader Control Center window or the bottom right status bar. The active workspace name should be visible and MUST NOT have an asterisk (*) next to it, as an asterisk indicates unsaved changes.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the native NinjaTrader 8 application interface on a Windows desktop, with standard menus, toolbars, and chart controls visible.

integrity.description: Verify that actual historical data is rendered on the charts
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts must display actual candlestick or bar data, not blank grids. The x-axis (time axis) should show dates corresponding to the 2023-2024 period.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just write the expected output in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration must be applied to the trading software's charts. There should be no Notepad or text editor windows open simply listing the indicators.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The AAPL chart must show SMA(50), SMA(200), and Volume. The MSFT chart must show EMA(20), BollingerBands(20,2), and MACD(12,26,9). Look for indicator labels in the top-left corner of the chart panels or in the sub-panels to verify the exact periods and parameters. The data displayed on the charts should correspond to the date range of January 2023 to December 2024.
